title: turnera brasiliensis
intro: Turnera brasiliensis, also known as Mayan gold or Damiana, is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Turnera brasiliensis include its ability to improve sexual function and libido, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Turnera brasiliensis include teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its various health benefits.
